privileged_info_summary: The AgTech Component Library task is a draw.io-based exercise with fully verified metadata. All paths are correctly specified: device specs at /home/ga/Desktop/device_specs.txt, library output at /home/ga/Diagrams/SmartGrow_Lib.xml, and diagram output at /home/ga/Diagrams/field_deployment.drawio. Color specifications are accurate hex codes: probe body is light green (#d5e8d4), probe tip is brown (#a0522d), hub body is light blue (#dae8fc), and status LED is red (#ff0000). The topology requires 1 Hub and 3 Probes connected with edges, and all components must be grouped. All data is synthetic, created during task setup by setup_task.sh.
